en: What... what do you remember about last night?
I went out, went to a bar, had a few shots, and I blacked out.
ko: 나갔어요, 바에 갔는데, 몇 잔 하다가 필름이 끊겼어요.

en: You decided to drive home last night.
You went through a pedestrian crossing.
and killed a family of three.
I'm obliged to tell you that you are under arrest.
I'm also obliged to give you this.
You get it for a three-kill streak.
Two more, you would have gotten a predator missile, and that would have been really cool.
ko: 두 명만 더 했으면 프레데터 미사일 받았을 텐데, 그거 진짜 멋졌을 텐데.
